He is a student atOur Lady in the Waterwho becameMatthew MacDell's first boyfriend and he first appeared in "My Furry Valentine". He is voiced byZachary Quinto. Aiden first appeared in "My Furry Valentine", when he andMatthewhappened to meet at aWalgreenspharmacy.Maury's"gay-dar" went off the charts, indicating that Aiden is gay. Matthew and Aiden hit it off and Maury's "gay-dar" was soon proven accurate. Aiden is a seemingly perfect smart altar boy with a romantic face and clear experience in relationships. He doesn’t have much personality leading up to Season 5.

characters.name: Alfredo Le Power Bottom
characters.description: Alfredo Le Power BottomBiographical InformationAliasesAlfredoGenderMale ♂Sexual OrientationHomosexualSocial InformationRelativesMr. Le Power Bottom (father)Physical AttributesSpeciesHumanoid angelSkinBrownEyesOrange-BrownHairBlackBackground InformationFirst AppearanceEveryone Watches PornVoice ActorLarry Owens[Source]Alfredo Le Power Bottomis the leader of the GayPornscape. He is an gay angel-like man with vast knowledge of male homosexuality. After Lola persuades Matthew to watch gay pornography with her, they are sent to a realm through her laptop, which is known as the "Gay Pornscape" and is portrayed as a lavish island. Though Lola is already acquainted, Matthew is apprehensive and new to the experience. He is introduced to Alfredo Le Power Bottom, who guides him and teaches him all sorts of gay sexual positions and terms in the gay men community. Matthew becomes overwhelmed and abruptly leaves, leaving Lola to her own devices. He is kind to visitors and eager to educate, mostly doing so through song. He is eccentric and deeply admired by the gay men who inhabit the Pornscape.
characters.personality_section: He is kind to visitors and eager to educate, mostly doing so through song. He is eccentric and deeply admired by the gay men who inhabit the Pornscape.

characters.name: Ali Cheng
characters.description: Ali ChengBiographical InformationAge13-14 (Season 3-6)14-15 (Season 7-8)AliasesThe Pansexual Girl (byJay)Hot Asian With Asian Boobs (role casted for Disclosure)Marital statusSingle😶GenderFemale ♀Sexual OrientationPansexualReligionChristianity⛪Social InformationRelativesAli's father(Unnamed father)ResidenceAli's HouseOccupationStudent atBridgeton Middle School(formerly)Student atBridgeton High School(current)Physical AttributesSpeciesHumanSkinTanEyesBrownHairBlackRelationshipsFriendsJay BilzerianJessi GlaserNick BirchAndrew GloubermanSamiraMissy Foreman-GreenwaldDevin LeSevenDeVon Furtive-OldmanMatthew MacDellCaleb LindenLarsElijahEnemiesTerry LizerLove InterestSamira(ex-girlfriend)Background InformationFirst Appearance"Rankings"Voice ActorAli Wong[Source] 14-15 (Season 7-8) Terry Lizer Ali is a confident and blunt girl who is open to lots of things and loves to swear and if she can get away with cursing she will go wild with it. She is also rather patient with her male classmates and their rude advances towards her. She is a bit stuck up about her sexuality and is dismissive of bisexuality as being "too binary". However, she does have a good heart since she supportedJessi Glaserin protesting the sexist school musical and is one of the only students who supportsJaywhen he comes out as bisexual.

characters.name: Alice Wong
characters.description: Alice WongBiographical InformationAge30StatusAlive🕊️Marital statusSingle😶GenderFemale ♀Sexual OrientationHeterosexualSocial InformationRelativesMrs. Wong(mother)ResidenceAlice's ApartmentOccupationDisability Rights ActivistPhysical AttributesSpeciesHumanRelationshipsFriendsSal Diaz(formerly)Traci Diaz(formerly)Olivia Diaz(formerly)Dav(formerly)EnemiesShawnCreaturesHormone MonsterConnie LaCienegaLovebug & HatewormRochelle HillhurstAnxiety MosquitoTito ThomasHope FairyHopeBackground InformationFirst Appearance"The Tell-Tale Dick"Voice ActorAlice Wong[Source]Alice Wongis a recurring character fromHuman Resources. She is a disability rights activist withspinal muscular atrophyandperinatal asphyxia. She first appeared in "The Tell-Tale Dick". She is voiced byAlice Wong. Alice Wong first appeared in the episode "The Tell-Tale Dick", where she scored a hot date with an attractive guy named Shawn, who followed her onTwitter.Rochellewent down to her apartment to help her get ready for her date but she made it abundantly clear that she should keep her expectations low, in case anything goes wrong. Rochelle was accompanied byHope, who contradicted this entirely and encouraged Alice and Rochelle to set their hopes sky high, since there's always an off chance the date could go beautifully. Although Rochelle was hesitant about this at first, Hope's musical number, "Have a Little Hope", changed her mind completely and she let this mindless optimism rub off on Alice. Alice went on her date with Shawn to The Tavern but they were blocked by some stairs, much to Alice's disappointment. Hope didn't let this ruin their night, as the nice little restaurant, La Cucina was right across the street from there and it was wheelchair accessible. Their date went fine at first, until she was approached by a couple of stupid abelist assholes, who told her about what an "inspiration" she was, not because of her work, but just because she was in a wheelchair. Shawn stood up to defend her and called them out on their bullshit but this all went downhill pretty quickly, when Shawn described Alice as his "colleague" instead of his "date", destroying her expectations. When asked why he asked her to dinner, Shawn said that it was to "pick her brain" and also added that he already had a girlfriend, which made Hope bail out on the date all together. Shawn asked to get connected with Alice's publisher, which is where Alice drew the line and told the ableist asshole to suck her butt and lick her balls before storming off to go put him on "the list" at home. Ultimately, Alice was mostly just mad at herself for getting her hopes up in the first place. In "Rochelle, Rochelle", Alice worked at her computer at home and was still bummed out about her bad date. Rochelle was now in the form of a hateworm with her. Alice got a video message from her landlord's friends,TraciandOlivia Diazand their austistic son, Sal, who didn't seem to know how to speak. Traci and Olivia told Alice how at Sal's Scho
characters.personality_section: Alice Wong is a negative and nihilistic woman, who seems to be as burdened emotionally as she is physically, by her disabilities. Besides obviously being born with medical conditions, there have been several unfortunate circumstances that she has fallen victim to over her years, which has given her a very pessimistic outlook on the universe. However, this does not stop her from being proud of herself and unapologetic in who she is. Alice is a very sassy and sarcastic kind of gal, who's always quick with an eye roll or a middle finger, whenever somebody pushes one of her buttons, of which she has many. For starters, she rejects any "pity" that others feel the need to give her and she also completely despises the stigma that "the only true disability is a bad attitude", which, unfortunately, is propagated to her by her own mother on a regular basis.

He has green skin, big ears, slicked-back dark green hair and violet eyes. He is a One-Time character and appeared inThe Department Of Puberty.

characters.name: Amir El-Khoury
characters.description: Amir El-KhouryBiographical InformationStatusAlive🕊️Marital statusMarried💒GenderMale ♂Sexual OrientationHeterosexualReligionIslam🕌Social InformationRelativesNabilah El-Khoury(wife)Nadja El-Khoury(daughter)Natalie El-Khoury(daughter)Yara El-Khoury(mother; deceased)Wassim El-Khoury(father; deceased)Unnamed brotherUnnamed sisterPhysical AttributesSpeciesHumanRelationshipsEnemiesKeith(formerly)Love InterestNabilah El-Khoury(wife)Background InformationFirst Appearance"Training Day"Voice ActorAhmed El-Mawas[Source]Amir El-Khouryis a minor character fromHuman Resources. He is the father ofNadjaandNatalie El-Khoury, the husband ofNabilah El-Khoury, and the son ofYara El-Khoury. He is voiced by Ahmed El-Mawas. InTraining Day, Amir is first introduced while visiting his mother, Yara, in the nursing home. He reintroduces himself to her briefly, knowing that she forgets him often, before looking for her favorite blanket to warm her up. He complains to the nursing staff that they're keeping her room too cold and demand they retrieve it from wherever they moved it. When Yara starts to panic due to her confusion, Amir calms her down by speaking soothingly to her and giving her rose tea. We learn from Yara that he visits her every day and always takes care of her. InRutgers is for Lovers, he celebratesNadja'sacceptance into his alma mater, UC Berkeley, by ripping open his button-down, revealing a Berkeley shirt he's been wearing under his clothes for two months straight "just in case". When Nadja tells him andNabilahthat she is not sure on her decision yet, he and his wife encourage her to pick her dream school over her high school crush. He reminds her that she needs to make decisions for herself and her own future and not for others, no matter how great they are. He is finally content when Nadja concedes to trying a long-distance relationship with her girlfriend and going to Berkeley.

characters.personality_section: Andrew is a very nerdy, awkward, blossoming teenage boy, who is suffering through puberty in all of its painful and disgusting glory. Andrew is very smart and he knows a lot of information about multiple different subjects. He is perverted, but only the normal amount for a boy his age. His masturbatory subjects vary from normal things such as pictures and thoughts of girls and women he knows, but also lots of weird things such as butt-shaped tomatoes. Despite his perverted demeanor, Andrew still has a soft side for love, as he fell in love withMissyand maintained a loving, nonsexual relationship with her. Andrew also has a passion for music and he plays the saxophone. He wears a fedora, which he is very fond of. Andrew has the tendency to complain about very pointless and trivial things, much like hisfatherand he can sometimes let his anger get the best of him, such as the time he cursed out at his friend,Nickin "Ejaculation" just for going to the prom with a girl instead of going to the prom as a group of friends with him,JayandJessi, and even worse, when he attackedLarsin "My Furry Valentine" for becoming friends with Missy and even throwing him out of his wheelchair and forcing him to walk.

characters.name: Andrew Rubenfeld
characters.description: Andrew RubenfeldBiographical InformationAge14AliasesOther AndrewRubenfeldRich BoyMarital statusSingle😶GenderMale ♂ReligionJudaism🕍Social InformationRelativesMr. Pink(cat)ResidenceWestchester, New YorkOccupationStudent atCobblestones AcademyPhysical AttributesSpeciesHumanEyesBlueHairBrownRelationshipsFriendsNick Birch(formerly)Benny QuiznosUnnamed rich pricksEnemiesAndrew GloubermanBackground InformationFirst AppearanceA Finger in TimeVoice ActorZach Woods[Source] Andrew Rubenfeld, aka "Other Andrew"is the false friend ofNick Birch, and former enemy ofAndrew Glouberman. Andrew Rubenfeld is introduced in “A Finger in Time”, where he befriends fellow student Nick Birch, who has been selected by Miss Cornhill, the librarian, to be apart of the Sad Boys Club atCobblestones Academy. After getting acquainted, Andrew and Nick opt out of the club. At first, he is show to be nice to Nick on his first day at Cooblestones Academy. However, in his last appearence, it is revealed he was only using Nick to join the Rich Pricks, thus ending their faux friendship.

characters.name: Asha
characters.description: AshaBiographical InformationStatusAlive🕊️Marital statusMarried💒GenderFemale ♀Sexual OrientationHeterosexualSocial InformationRelativesArsalan(husband)Physical AttributesSpeciesShame WizardsRelationshipsEnemiesLionel St. SwithensLove InterestArsalan(husband)ClientsSharonBackground InformationVoice ActorLupita Nyong'o[Source]Ashais ashame wizard, who works in the Kenyan Department ofHuman Resources. She first appeared in theHuman Resourcesepisode, "International Creature Convention". She wasLionel St. Swithens’s one sided lover and Arsalan’s wife. In "International Creature Convention", Asha attended The International Creature Convention, where she metLionel St. Swithensand flirted with him over his belt and took him up to her room. In her room, Asha would insult and berate Lionel, as she had a fetish for erotic humiliation. Their sex was interrupted by Asha's husband,Arsalancoming home. While Lionel hid under the bed, Asha and Arsalan got into a huge argument, leaving Asha crying. Asha later asked Lionel if he could murder Arsalan for her and gave him a revolver. Lionel went to the roof of theRadisson Over North Koreaand shot Arsalan in the chest, only for it to be revealed that he was wearing a bullet-proof vest. Asha then came up behind Lionel and knocked him out cold with a tire iron. Lionel awoke, tied to a bed with Asha and Arsalan both there, insulting him. This turned out to have all been a plot staged by both of them, so that they could have sex in front of the man they just humiliated and then bring him in for a three way, where they would all hurt each other. During their orgy, Lionel used the revolver on Arsalan again, only to fatally shoot him in the chest, as he was no longer wearing the bullet-proof vest. Asha started freaking out and crying over her dying husband and embarrassed, Lionel slinked out of the room, awkwardly. Later on the plane when asked if he killed somone Lionel states Arsalan is gonna live, though.
